summary: Frontend-only retest of Fork·Fate light/dark theme sync fix. All acceptance criteria PASS: shared useTheme store propagates to Favorites button + drawer, spin CTA label + color, Add-spot tan, header brand size, and dark regression. Zero console errors. No Places/API calls issued.
verified_expectations: LIGHT: open-favorites-button color = rgb(63,63,70) (dark grey, NOT white) ✅
LIGHT: favorites-drawer bg = rgb(251,247,239) cream (NOT rgb(14,14,14)); 'Saved spots' title color = rgb(42,33,24) dark ✅
LIGHT: spin-roulette-button bg = rgb(168,201,158) sage; box-shadow uses rgba(122,168,110,0.3) — NO rgb(224,30,38) red glow ✅
LIGHT: open-add-restaurant-button bg = rgb(216,195,165) tan (#D8C3A5), NOT white ✅
Header brand SPAN 'Fork·Fate' fontSize = 48px at 1920 (md:text-5xl) — larger than 30px threshold ✅
DARK regression: fav color rgb(255,255,255), spin bg rgb(224,30,38), shadow includes rgba(224,30,38,0.25), CTA 'Deal Your Fate!' ✅
Console errors during full toggle cycle: 0 ✅
context_for_next_testing_agent: Shared useTheme store via useSyncExternalStore now correctly propagates theme changes to all consumers (Favorites drawer/button, spin CTA, Add-spot). Preset localStorage 'ff_guided_seen'='1' and 'ff_theme' before load. Do NOT click Deal/Spin — that triggers Google Places calls.
